name: Madhav Jha
why: Penn State PhD in Theoretical Computer Science (his LinkedIn: 'Making vibe coding a reality at Emergent'); Emergent is a vibe-coding AI platform actively hiring engineers — 30 open roles on YC/Work at a Startup incl. an open new-grad-welcome engineer track, fresh off a Series B.
connect: Hi Madhav — fellow Nittany Lion here (AI Eng '27; you did your CS PhD at Penn State). Emergent's vibe-coding work is exactly the future I'm building toward. Would love to connect.
followup: Thanks for connecting, Madhav — always great to meet a fellow Penn Stater. I'm an AI Engineering student ('27) who vibe-codes and ships full products solo. I built PAIS, a platform of autonomous AI agent workflows run from one Control Room (https://getpais.company), plus BrainScan (open-source AI) and a live trading bot — stack's Python/React/AWS/Firebase. Saw Emergent is hiring engineers; I'd love 15 min to hear what you look for in a founding-style builder. Open to a quick chat?

Stack: Python, React, AWS, Firebase. I noticed Wicket's looking for full-stack developers — would you be open to a quick chat about the role and what you need?

followup: Thanks for connecting, Carl — proud to share the Penn State tie.
